creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

We no longer support FreeBSD 5.4 (5.5, 5-STABLE only on the 5.X branch), but 
I suspect you have some bad data in /usr/local/include.  You might try going 
through each file in /usr/local/include with pkg_info -W and remove those 
that have no backing package. 

If you upgrade to 5.5 or higher, and still see this problem, open a new PR 
after reviewing the insturctions at 
http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html .
